name: SF30 V2.0
description: Stealth shift grabber for Amazon AtoZ — silent polling, instant claiming, zero detection.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src https://atoz.amazon.work https://atoz-apps.amazon.work https://api.telegram.org https://license.sf30.app; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; media-src 'self'; frame-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none'
